notes: Next.js 15 App Router structure with route groups
API routes: /api/health, /api/seed, /api/stats
Route groups: (chart) for bar-chart, (dashboard) for dashboard
Health check endpoint implemented
Seed endpoint with Prisma/Mirage dual support
Stats endpoint for data retrieval
Comprehensive test coverage for dashboard components
Application layer hooks following Clean Architecture
useDataGeneration: Manages data generation config and state
useStats: SWR-based data fetching with validation
useSeedGeneration: Handles seed data generation
Comprehensive test coverage: config, events, generation, bounds, error handling
Integration tests for data generation flow
Error handling with custom error types
Type-safe API validation with Zod schemas
Dashboard: Main component with data fetching, error handling, notification system
Charts: Comprehensive chart library (DayOfWeek, Emotion, Monthly, Student, TimeOfDay)
DynamicBarChart: Highly configurable with data filtering and edge case handling
Common components: ComponentCard, ErrorBoundary, LoadingSpinner, Notification, Icons
UI components: Button with test coverage
ErrorBoundary with structured logging integration
Comprehensive test coverage: accessibility, dataFetching, interactions, notifications, performance, rendering
Charts have extensive test suites: configuration, dataFiltering, edgeCases, errorHandling, integration
Follows Clean Architecture: imports from schemas, lib (cross-cutting), no domain/infrastructure imports
Domain layer following Clean Architecture (no dependencies on other layers)
Entities: Record (core data model), Stats (statistics aggregate), StatsOverview, MonthlyStats, StudentStats, DayOfWeekStats, TimeOfDayStats
Repositories: StatsRepository (interface), IRecordRepository (interface), MockRecordRepository (implementation for testing)
Services: StatsService (statistics calculation and seed data generation), EmotionGenerator (emotion data generation with patterns)
Data generation: DataGenerationConfig with EMOTION_CONSTANTS and DATA_GENERATION_BOUNDS for realistic emotion simulation
Tests are co-located with source files (domain-specific testing pattern)
Comprehensive test coverage: contract tests, behavior tests, integration tests for repositories
Entity tests: Record validation, Stats aggregation, DataGeneration config/patterns/seasonal effects/events
Clean Architecture compliance: Domain layer has zero imports from infrastructure/presentation/application layers
